steps_completed.task: Create test file with imports from vitest, @testing-library/react, and AssumptionContext. Define wrapper function using AssumptionProvider.
Write initial state tests: assumptions empty, hasAssumption false, getAssumption undefined, contextPayload empty.
Write addAssumption tests: single add, multiple adds, replace same variableId.
Write removeAssumption tests: remove existing, no-op for non-existent.
Write clearAll test: add multiple then clear, verify empty.
Write hasAssumption and getAssumption tests: true/false, matching/undefined.
Write contextPayload test: verify only variableId and outcomeId (no label).
Write useAssumptions outside provider test with console.error suppression.
